1890190.name: A Spirits Journey
1890190.description:
Live Your Tail

     Dead by mysterious means, upon discovering the reason for your murder, you begin to seek your revenge. You hack and slash your way through various enemies in pursuit to get your revenge, or will you instead join your killers and aid in their plot. What path will you choose!?

     In this anime styled game work toward your goal as you traverse through the spirit and human plains to take out those in control.  As you face off with currupted spirits, cultists and monsters of various origins.

Game Features

  • Traverse an open 3D world with amazing views, mystical sites and hidden secrets all around.

  • Discover pockets of spirit infused caverns, finding runes and tomes that speak of ancient wars and spiritual items that were used during them and the potential impact it could have on the future.

  • Position yourself as you dash, dodge and cut your way through your enemies.

  • Choose your path as you progress, and expirence the consequences of your choice.

  • Discover new skills, then upgrade them for more impact and uses.

  • Fortify your own spirit to grow stronger and become even more deadly.

  • Modify your equipment with spirit Fragments, adding new possibilities to your fights.

  • Lots of demanding bosses that require many skills and different tacticks to defeat.

  • Solve puzzles and find ancient relics that when obtained allow for new abilities to be used at will.

英语*
